subject: Weakness Policy — item card showing a folded or rolled document or scroll with text, encased in a glowing or sparkling ethereal bubble
description: The card art depicts what appears to be a scroll or folded document with text visible on it, suspended within a translucent glowing bubble or energy field. The bubble has a soft iridescent quality with sparkle or light effects around its edges. The background is a soft blue-purple gradient. The document itself appears curled or rolled. The overall impression is of a formal agreement or policy protected by some kind of magical seal — consistent with the card's name.
foreground: scroll or folded document with text, encased in iridescent translucent bubble with sparkle effects
